name: 道の駅 小国
desc: 旧国鉄宮原線の廃駅跡地に1986年建てられた、日本初の木造立体トラス構法・全面ミラーガラスの道の駅。小国町特産品や土産物を扱う。
descEn: Built in 1986 on the site of the former Miyanohara Line railway, this was Japan's first roadside station using wooden truss construction with all-glass mirrored walls. Sells Oguni Town specialties and souvenirs.
